rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JOHNNY J. AND MARGIE CHERRY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Responses To Special Interrogatories Set 1 And Set 2 And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Hearing on Motion for an Order Compelling Responses to Special Interrogatories Set One and Set Two is continued to January 17, 2024, at 2:00 p.m., so as to be heard after: November 15, 2023 hearing on Status of Mediation; November 15, 2023 hearing on Petition by Windy Cherry Concerning the Internal Affairs of a Trust and for Declaratory Relief/Damages, etc.; the remittitur of appeal in allegedly-related case CUD-21-668280; December 27, 2023 Case Management Conference in Dept. 610 on Status of Stay in allegedly-related case CGC-21-594979.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JOHNNY J. AND MARGIE CHERRY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Deeming Matters Specified In Requests For Admission Set 1 And Set 2 Admitted And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Hearing on Motion for an Order Deeming Matters Specified in Requests for Admission Set One and Set Two is continued to January 17, 2024, at 2:00 p.m., so as to be heard after: November 15, 2023 hearing on Status of Mediation; November 15, 2023 hearing on Petition by Windy Cherry Concerning the Internal Affairs of a Trust and for Declaratory Relief/Damages, etc.; the remittitur of appeal in allegedly-related case CUD-21-668280; December 27, 2023 Case Management Conference in Dept. 610 on Status of Stay in allegedly-related case CGC-21-594979.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JOHNNY J. AND MARGIE CHERRY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents Set 1 And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Hearing on Motion for an Order Compelling Responses to Request for Production of Documents Set One is continued to January 17, 2024, at 2:00 p.m., so as to be heard after: November 15, 2023 hearing on Status of Mediation; November 15, 2023 hearing on Petition by Windy Cherry Concerning the Internal Affairs of a Trust and for Declaratory Relief/Damages, etc.; the remittitur of appeal in allegedly-related case CUD-21-668280; December 27, 2023 Case Management Conference in Dept. 610 on Status of Stay in allegedly-related case CGC-21-594979.
